name: Big Oak Driving Range & Golf Shop Inc
about: Big Oak Driving Range & Golf Shop Inc is a comprehensive golf facility located in Rochester, NY, offering a driving range with Toptracer technology, a fully stocked golf shop, and a golf simulator. Established in 1970, the venue serves as a one-stop-shop for all golfing needs, including club fitting, lessons, repairs, and league play. The facility caters to golfers of all levels, providing both practice areas and high-tech simulation experiences alongside professional coaching services.
why_golfers_like_it: Toptracer technology enhances practice with real-time shot tracking
Professional club fitting services use advanced launch monitors
Comprehensive retail shop provides access to premium golf equipment
On-site lessons and coaching available for skill improvement
Golf simulator offers year-round practice regardless of weather

simulator_hardware.notes: Toptracer technology mentioned for driving range and simulator

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: You can bring your own clubs, but the venue also offers club rentals and a pro shop for purchasing equipment.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: No external food or drink services are mentioned, so it's best to check with the venue directly.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes on the simulator?
faq.answer: The time required for 18 holes isn't specified, but simulator sessions are typically booked by the hour.

faq.question: Is this venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: The venue doesn't specifically mention kid-friendly features, but lessons and family activities suggest it may accommodate juniors.
